summary: P1.8-1 shop profile classification: classifyShopProfile pure function, ADR-026 WORKFLOW_CATALOG, boundary fixtures, and 14 unit tests. Extends seller-stage-router without replacing demo persona routing.

interfaceChanges.description: Rules-based NEW_SHOP | MID_LARGE_SHOP classifier from unified operational model.
Profile-gated map to six ADR-026 validated workflow IDs.

mappings.criterion: classifyShopProfile() pure function with exported types
WORKFLOW_CATALOG mapping profiles to exactly the six ADR-026 workflows
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_classification.test.ts::covers every validated workflow exactly once across profiles

mappings.criterion: Unit tests with boundary fixtures: probation shop → NEW_SHOP; graduated mid/large → MID_LARGE_SHOP
Test: NEW_SHOP catalog excludes growth/loss workflows; MID_LARGE excludes probation-only framing
Test: catalog never references workflow IDs outside ADR-026 stable IDs
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_operations_classification.test.ts::never references workflow IDs outside ADR-026 stable IDs
